queries.question: What activities are common to all lessons
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.description  from Lessons_Activities join Activities on Lessons_Activities.activitiesType = Activities.activityType join Lessons on Lessons_Activities.lessonsId = Lessons.id   GROUP BY Lessons_Activities.activitiesType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Lessons_Activities.lessonsId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Lessons)

queries.question: What activities do all lessons have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.activityType  from Lessons_Activities join Activities on Lessons_Activities.activitiesType = Activities.activityType join Lessons on Lessons_Activities.lessonsId = Lessons.id   GROUP BY Lessons_Activities.activitiesType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Lessons_Activities.lessonsId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Lessons)

queries.question: Which activity type and description of activities are shared by all lessons?
queries.sql: SELECT Activities.activityType, Activities.description  from Lessons_Activities join Activities on Lessons_Activities.activitiesType = Activities.activityType join Lessons on Lessons_Activities.lessonsId = Lessons.id   GROUP BY Lessons_Activities.activitiesType HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Lessons_Activities.lessonsId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Lessons)

queries.question: For each lesson, show me the description of activities on offer
queries.sql: select lessons.lessonname , activities.description from Lessons_Activities join Activities on Lessons_Activities.activitiesType = Activities.activityType join Lessons on Lessons_Activities.lessonsId = Lessons.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?lessonname ?description WHERE {
  ?lessons_activities a :Lessons_Activities .
  ?activities a :Activities .
  ?lessons_activities p:hasActivities ?activities .
  ?lessons a :Lessons .
  ?lessons_activities p:hasLessons ?lessons .
  ?lessons p:lessonName ?lessonname .
  ?activities p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: What activity types and descriptions are associated with each lesson?
queries.sql: select lessons.lessonname , activities.activitytype , activities.description from Lessons_Activities join Activities on Lessons_Activities.activitiesType = Activities.activityType join Lessons on Lessons_Activities.lessonsId = Lessons.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?lessonname ?activitytype ?description WHERE {
  ?lessons_activities a :Lessons_Activities .
  ?activities a :Activities .
  ?lessons_activities p:hasActivities ?activities .
  ?lessons a :Lessons .
  ?lessons_activities p:hasLessons ?lessons .
  ?lessons p:lessonName ?lessonname .
  ?activities p:activityType ?activitytype .
  ?activities p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: For each lesson, list the activities they have.
queries.sql: select lessons.lessonname , activities.activitytype from Lessons_Activities join Activities on Lessons_Activities.activitiesType = Activities.activityType join Lessons on Lessons_Activities.lessonsId = Lessons.id
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?lessons a :Lessons .
  ?lessons_activities p:hasLessons ?lessons .
  ?lessons p:lessonName ?lessonname .
  ?activities p:activityType ?activitytype .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the descriptions for each activity for all lessons
Tell me the activities every lesson has.
What activity types and descriptions are associated with each lesson?
